raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I purchased a vacation package for me and my husband to XXXX with a travel agent using my XXXX XXXX credit card. I paid for round trip airfare, XXXX nights ( XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX, XXXX ) at a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX round trip transportation to and a lot of extras at the resort for a total of {$3600.00}. After learning of the hurricane impact on the island, I was never contacted by the travel agent with any information on how my trip would be impacted. I took the initiative and reached out on XX/XX/XXXX both to the agent and RIU directly. XXXX representative assured me that the resort will reopen on XX/XX/XXXX, ahead of their planned XX/XX/XXXX reopening date and the resort will be fully operational without interruptions. On XX/XX/XXXX, I reached out again and learned that the property will not reopen until XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX refused to talk to me about my refund options as I did not book with them directly. I then tried to get a hold of the agent. My only options were to travel else where but pay extra for different accommodations. When I did not want to pay extra and did not want to endanger me and my husband being stranded on an island without any living accommodations, the merchant provided me a split credit to our names in a dollar amount that now is not equivalent for the service/product I initially paid for. As the merchant failed to render services/product I paid for I turned to my credit card to dispute the charge. I was issued a provisional credit that was then reversed as my dispute Case ID : XXXX was denied by a letter dated on XX/XX/XXXX. I sent and faxed a letter that the credit card confirmed was received on XX/XX/XXXX with additional details and a request to continue the dispute investigation. I then received a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX that my dispute was unable to be resolved. On XX/XX/XXXX credit card representative XXXX confirmed that my case is now closed and I am liable for charges for a service and product I never received as merchant issued me a credit that is not equivalent for the services/product I initially paid for. 
It's very unprofessional and unethical that the credit card is acting in bad faith and is siding with the merchant who made false accusations against me so I turn to you for help.
